name: io.github.mshegolev/gitlab-ci-mcp
description: GitLab CI/CD MCP — pipelines, jobs, schedules, MRs, files. Any GitLab (SaaS or self-hosted).

environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_URL
environmentVariables.description: GitLab instance URL (e.g. https://gitlab.com or https://gitlab.example.com)

environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: GitLab Personal Access Token with 'api' scope

environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_PROJECT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Default project path (e.g. my-org/my-repo); can be overridden per call

environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_SSL_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Verify SSL certificates (true/false). Set to 'false' for self-hosted GitLab with self-signed certs.
